scripts.dev:all: pnpm run --parallel dev dev:marketing dev:customer dev:admin
scripts.docker:up: docker compose -f docker/docker-compose.yml up -d nexaros-postgres nexaros-redis
scripts.docker:up:apps: docker compose -f docker/docker-compose.yml up -d nexaros-backend nexaros-customer nexaros-marketing nexaros-admin
scripts.docker:restart: docker compose -f docker/docker-compose.yml down && docker compose -f docker/docker-compose.yml up -d nexaros-postgres nexaros-redis
scripts.docker:logs:infra: docker compose -f docker/docker-compose.yml logs -f nexaros-postgres nexaros-redis
